title: ononis pendula subsp. grandiflora
intro: Ononis pendula subsp. grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered gromwell, is a flowering plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce pain, and improve cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. The large-flowered gromwell can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use.
